title: Owlnest Lume: Compact Circadian Rhythm Lamp
subtitle: Designed for the 1 to 2 hours before bed with a night-friendly amber spectrum.
description: Owlnest Lume is not a generic night light or a normal warm lamp. It is a compact circadian rhythm lamp designed to support a calmer evening wind-down before sleep.
notice: Preview pricing is now available. Final quantities, shipping details, and campaign timing will be confirmed at launch.

supporterPerks.title: Why Follow Early?
supporterPerks.intro: Supporters who follow our Indiegogo campaign early may unlock extra launch value and occasional community appreciation opportunities.

items.title: $5 Followers Discount
items.text: Followers on Indiegogo will be eligible for an extra $5 followers discount when the campaign goes live.

items.title: Active Backer Opportunities
items.text: Especially engaged backers may occasionally be considered for complimentary future-release opportunities, including second-generation product consideration or member-only credit perks. Availability and selection details will be announced separately.

timeline.title: Campaign Launch
timeline.text: Our Indiegogo campaign goes live with early supporter pricing.

timeline.title: Production Preparation
timeline.text: Final production scheduling, QA checks, and packaging preparation.

timeline.title: Shipping
timeline.text: Orders begin shipping to supported regions.

faq.a: Owlnest Lume is a compact circadian rhythm lamp designed for nighttime use, especially during the 1 to 2 hours before bed.

faq.q: How is it different from a normal warm lamp or night light?
faq.a: Owlnest Lume is designed around a night-friendly amber spectrum for evening use. It is meant to feel gentler and more sleep-compatible than ordinary bright or generic warm lighting.

faq.q: What do I get if I follow the campaign before launch?
faq.a: Supporters who follow the campaign on Indiegogo before launch will be eligible for an additional $5 followers discount when the campaign goes live.

faq.q: Are there any community perks for active backers?
faq.a: From time to time, we may extend community appreciation perks to especially engaged backers. These may include future product access opportunities, early consideration for upcoming releases. Details, availability, and selection criteria will be announced separately.
We plan to ship to select regions including the US, UK, EU, and Taiwan. Final shipping costs and supported destinations will be confirmed at launch.

faq.q: How do I join the Discord community?
faq.a: Our Discord is optional and open to anyone who wants to follow the project. Verified owners can request product-owner access after delivery through the Member Portal.
All campaign orders are expected to include a standard 1-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects.
